{{Quote|Everyone on the crew had lost… everyone, everything. Our families came from Chianar, Aldera…|[[Dannan Kelvan]] to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="RZR">''[[Razor's Edge]]''</ref>}}
'''Chianar''' was a pastoral settlement founded on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]] for refugees from the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. [[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, during the early [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], several crewmembers of the [[Alderaanian gunship]] [[Aegis (Alderaanian gunship)|''Aegis'']] hailed from Chianar.

==History==
{{Quote|Former Supreme Chancellor Finis Valorum rolled up his shirt sleeves and grabbed a power-shovel, breaking soil and chipping in as the Refugee Relief Movement began transforming 100 hectares of donated Alderaanian plains into new homes.|Extract from the HoloNet News|<ref name="HN9N" />}}
The village of Chianar began its life as a 100-[[Hectare/Legends|hectare]] plot of donated land on the grassy plains of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], with a petrified [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] hive mound on it. The settlement was created by the [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|Refugee Relief Movement]] in an attempt to offset the sudden, massive overcrowding of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] by refugees from secessionist [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] planets.<ref name="HN9N" />

With Alderaan having loosened its immigration laws, Chianar became the home of hundreds of displaced exiles, including [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] and other [[Species/Legends|species]]; former [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Finis Valorum]] himself participated in the Chianar ground-breaking ceremonies prior to the eruption of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="HN9N" />

By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Chianar had developed well. Some members of families who called it home served on the [[Alderaanian gunship]] [[Aegis (Alderaanian gunship)|''Aegis'']], under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Caline Metara]].<ref name="RZR" /> Like the rest of Alderaan, it was destroyed by the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star's]] [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="ANH" />
